title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend Film's Teaser Reveals October 16 Release Date
content: Aniplex unveiled a new teaser trailer for Seishun Buta Yarō wa Dear Friend no Yume o Minai (Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend) film, the latest anime adaptation of Hajime Kamoshida's Rascal Does Not Dream (Seishun Buta Yarō or Aobuta) novel series, during its stage event for the film at AnimeJapan 2026 on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: 'Gensou Suikoden' Announces Supporting Cast
content: The Gensou Suikoden ( Suikoden: The Anime ) White Stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed supporting cast members and a fourth key visual (pictured) on Sunday. The anime series adapting Konami's fantasy role-playing game will begin airing in October 2026.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musou' Announces Additional Cast, Teaser Promo
content: The Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musou: Nidome no Tensei, S-Rank Cheat Majutsushi Boukenroku ( The Failed Sage's Academy Domination ) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the NBCUniversal booth revealed additional cast and a teaser promotional video on Sunday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)!' TV Anime Reveals July Debut, More Cast
content: The official website for the television anime of Atekichi and Yukiko's Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)! (Heroine? Seijo? Iie, All Works Maid desu (ko)!) light novel series revealed a teaser promotional video and one more cast member on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: 'Baki-dou' Second Part Announced
content: The Baki-dou Blue Stage at AnimeJapan 2026 announced a second part on Sunday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured) and teaser promotional video. The second part will be released worldwide exclusively on Netflix.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Isekai Nonbiri Nouka 2' Reveals Additional Cast, Second Promo
content: • The Isekai Nonbiri Nouka 2 ( Farming Life in Another World Season 2 ) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the Pony Canyon booth revealed additional cast, a key visual (pictured right), and a second promotional video on Sunday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Let's Go Kaiki-gumi' Reveals Additional Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo for Summer 2026
content: The Let's Go Kaiki-gumi presentation on the TBS stage at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed additional cast, staff, ending theme, key visual (pictured), and a teaser promotional video on Sunday. The anime adapting Byuu 's supernatural comedy manga will begin airing on July 5 at 4:30 p.m. on TBS and 28 affiliated channels.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Heroine? Seijo? Iie, All Works Maid desu (Hokori)!' Reveals Production Staff, Additional Cast, Teaser Promo for Summer 2026
content: The Heroine? Seijo? Iie, All Works Maid desu (Hokori)! ( Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)! ) AnimeJapan 2026 stage event at the d Anime Store booth revealed the production staff, additional cast and a teaser promotional video on Sunday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Seihantai na Kimi to Boku' Season 2 Announced for Summer 2026
content: The Seihantai na Kimi to Boku ( You and I Are Polar Opposites ) White Stage announcement on Sunday that a second season is in production, revealing an announcement video. The second season is scheduled to premiere on July 5 at 5:00 p.m. on MBS and TBS.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Romelia Senki' Unveils Additional Cast, 2 Cours Broadcast
content: The Pony Canyon booth at AnimeJapan 2026 revealed four additional cast and a second teaser visual (pictured) for the Romelia Senki ( Romelia War Chronicle ) television anime on Sunday. The anime series adapting Ryou Ariyama 's action fantasy light novel will air in two cours in 2026.
author: MyAnimeList
